name: eventstream-authoring-cli
description: > Create, wire, and publish Microsoft Fabric Eventstream real-time event streaming topologies via the Fabric Items REST API. Build graph-based definitions with 25 source types (Event Hubs, IoT Hub, CDC connectors, Kafka, SampleData), 8 transformation operators (Filter, Aggregate, GroupBy, Join, ManageFields, Union, Expand, SQL), 4 destination types (Lakehouse Delta, Eventhouse, Activator, Custom Endpoint), and DefaultStream/DerivedStream routing. Use when the user wants to: (1) author or publish
author: microsoft
